design_philosophy: Control Room Grid layout. Maximum density with absolute clarity. Semantic colors are strictly used for status communication (Ageing, SLA). Typography is high-contrast, professional, and hierarchical to ensure rapid scanning.

hierarchy.table_header: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500 bg-slate-50

surfaces.table_wrapper: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-sm

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors bg-emerald-800 text-white hover:bg-emerald-900 h-9 px-4 shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-slate-900 h-9 px-4
buttons.danger: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors bg-rose-50 text-rose-700 hover:bg-rose-100 border border-rose-200 h-9 px-4

tables.header: bg-slate-50 border-b border-slate-200 sticky top-0 z-10
tables.alignment: Numbers right-aligned, Text left-aligned, Actions centered.

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold border

kpi_cards.structure: Flex column, gap-2. Icon top right (subdued color). Title top left. Large value bottom left. Trend indicator bottom right.

workflow_funnel.structure: Use Recharts (FunnelChart) or a custom horizontal CSS flex-based step process with varying heights/widths to represent volume dropping per stage.

ageing_heat_map.structure: A grid of 4 cards/blocks displaying the counts for 0-3, 4-7, 8-15, and 15+ days. Each block should have a thick top border or a background tint corresponding to the bucket's semantic color from `colors.heat_map_buckets`.

interactions_and_motion.hover: Subtle -translate-y-[1px] on cards with slight shadow increase. Row highlight on tables.

image_urls.description: Modern glass office building for Login Page Background

testing.rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, tabs, table rows) MUST have a data-testid attribute. Use kebab-case format (e.g., 'submit-login-button', 'itr-row-0').

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all components use .jsx or .js extensions only. DO NOT generate .tsx or .ts files.
Initialize React app with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn/UI.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard (dense, gap-4 to gap-6, maximizing screen real estate).
For the Login screen, use 'login_background' with a heavy dark overlay (bg-slate-900/60) to contrast with the bright inner dashboard.
The Return Master table is the core operational module: ensure it supports sticky headers, dense row heights, and horizontal scrolling if needed.
Implement the Ageing Heat Map using the specific hex codes provided in `heat_map_buckets` for instant visual impact.
The Escalation system should be a prominent panel (e.g., right sidebar or top-level alerts) using the warning/danger semantic styles.
All forms (Client Master, Workflow Stage Master) should use Shadcn form primitives customized with the specific typography and button styles.
Ensure the Workflow Funnel is visually engaging and clickable, filtering the Return Master list based on the clicked stage.
